headline: T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) – Among the 10 Best High-Yield Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 5.25%, T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:TROW) is included among the 10 Best High-Yield Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 24, JPMorgan analyst Kenneth Worthington lowered the firm’s price recommendation on T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:TROW) to $103 from $106. The firm maintained an Underweight rating on […]
